flash_interface: OneNAND (CS0), configured by NLoader at boot
bml_layer: Block Management Layer (BML) for wear leveling
stl_layer: Sector Translation Layer (STL) for PMM data

security.description: Every loaded image is authenticated via BB5 public key chain before execution
security.note_2026_03_01: TOC offsets corrected from full 32-bit decode. SOS+IVE3A/B confirmed BB5-encrypted (entropy 7.99/8.0). SOS+IVE3B not in firmware update FPSXs.

emmc.notes: Separate from OneNAND. Acts as mass storage USB device.

lpddr.notes: Configured by ROM bootloader. NLoader does NOT re-configure SDRC.

combo_memory.description: Stacked on top of RAPUYAMA physically

nand_toc.name: SWBL
nand_toc.notes: Loaded by ROM bootloader from NAND. Minimal init, loads PRIMAPP.

nand_toc.name: ADA
nand_toc.notes: Purpose not fully documented

nand_toc.name: KEYS
nand_toc.notes: Negative offset indicates end-of-flash placement in Nokia TOC format

nand_toc.name: R&D
nand_toc.notes: R&D mode flag: 'R&D : ROFS check disabled' — disables image auth in R&D mode

nand_toc.name: PRIMAPP
nand_toc.notes: 128KB ARM Thumb code. Performs hardware detection, PMIC init, clock config, image load.

nand_toc.name: RAP3NAND
nand_toc.notes: NAND flash block management layer for RAPUYAMA modem

nand_toc.name: SOS+PMML
nand_toc.notes: Nokia codename: SOS = Symbian OS. PMM = Post Mortem Memory layer.

nand_toc.name: SOS+DECOMP
nand_toc.notes: zlib-based decompressor for compressed ROFS images. zlib 1.2.1.f-Nokia-mods-v2.

nand_toc.name: PASUBTOC
nand_toc.notes: Sub-table of contents for platform authentication

nand_toc.name: PAPUBKEYS
nand_toc.description: BB5 public keys for image authentication
nand_toc.notes: Public key store used to verify BB5 signatures on all other partitions

nand_toc.name: GENIO_INIT
nand_toc.description: GPIO and pad mux initialization table
nand_toc.notes: ENCRYPTED (BB5 signed). Contains (address, value) pairs applied to OMAP3630 pad mux registers at boot. NLoader decrypts at runtime. entropy=7.99/8.0 (fully encrypted). Not recoverable without BB5 private keys.

nand_toc.name: SOS+IVE3A
nand_toc.description: BCM2727 IVE firmware stage 1 boot loader
nand_toc.notes: BB5-ENCRYPTED (entropy 7.99/8.0). Extracted to firmware-re/bcm2727/sos-ive3a.bin. Cannot be decrypted without hardware security keys.

nand_toc.name: SOS+IVE3B
nand_toc.notes: Main BCM2727 VideoCore III firmware (Nucleus PLUS RTOS). NOT included in firmware update FPSX files — factory-programmed only. Empty in rofs.img extraction.

nand_toc.name: SOS*UPDAPP
nand_toc.notes: Firmware update handler. '*' prefix = optional/conditional partition.

nand_toc.name: NPC
nand_toc.notes: Nokia Product Configuration

nand_toc.name: CCC
nand_toc.notes: Customer Care Center configuration

nand_toc.name: HWC
nand_toc.notes: Hardware variant configuration block

nand_toc.name: PARTNERC
nand_toc.notes: Operator/partner certificate (256KB)

nand_toc.name: SUSD1
nand_toc.notes: Nokia SUSD (Software Update Slot Data) 1

nand_toc.name: SUSD2
nand_toc.notes: Nokia SUSD (Software Update Slot Data) 2

nand_toc.name: SOS*ENO
nand_toc.notes: Minimal emergency OS stored in NOR flash area. '*' = optional.

nand_toc.name: SOS*DSP0
nand_toc.notes: Rapuyama modem baseband DSP firmware image 0

nand_toc.name: LDSP
nand_toc.notes: DSP firmware loaded by NLoader: 'LDSP loaded by Nloader' / 'DSP code started'

nand_toc.name: SOS*ISASW
nand_toc.notes: Rapuyama modem ISA software stack (~237MB). Huge partition. '*' = optional.

nand_toc.name: SOS+CORE
nand_toc.notes: Main Symbian kernel image including core ROFS filesystem. '+' = mandatory.

nand_toc.name: SOS+ROFS1
nand_toc.notes: 137 MB content total (per firmware-strings-index). Read-Only FileSystem.

nand_toc.name: SOS+ROFS2
nand_toc.notes: 217 MB content: UI localisation (30+ languages), help HTML/XML, widget configs.

nand_toc.name: SOS+ROFS3
nand_toc.notes: Locale-specific data, fonts, regional settings

nand_toc.name: SOS-USER
nand_toc.notes: Writable user data partition. '-' = data/writable partition.

nand_toc.name: SOS-SWAP
nand_toc.notes: System swap space (16KB)

nand_toc.name: SOS-PMM
nand_toc.notes: Persists across reboot. Stores last-crash diagnostic data via STL layer.

nand_toc.name: SOS-CRASH
nand_toc.notes: Full crash dump area. Offset and size not documented in available sources.

boot_sequence.name: NLoader (PRIMAPP)
actions: Charger detection at I2C addr 0x6B (BQ2415x / SMB338 / SMB138)
GENIO_INIT authentication and GPIO pad mux application
SmartReflex VCore calibration (RAPU and YAMA domains)
BB5 image authentication for all images
Hardware config report (SDRAM, speeds, TOC location)

clock_config.bypass_string: MCU PLL is in ByPass Mode (38.4MHz)
clock_config.sr_failure_string: SR calibration failed -> OPs are limited to 450MHz
